productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Dress Pink Pooh Kidswear
description: Composition:100% cotton pink Daisy dress with tie up sleevesWashcare:Machine wash in cold water with a gentle cycle using mild detergent. Wash dark colours seperately. Do not bleach. Do not soak nor wring. Dry it inside out. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron on print and studs.Fitting:Comfort FitThis pink dress from disney with tie ups, ruffle hem and a baby Daisy will surely be a favourite with your little girl. Team this dress with her favourite shoes and be sure to find her being adored by all.
